message:
Command `# Process still running - step 32 GRT complete but state_out not written yet.
# At 2.5% CPU / no file updates in last 5 min - might be detailed routing (DRT) starting in memory.
# DRT (TritonRoute) takes MUCH longer (hours). Let's set a longer monitor interval.
sleep 600
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
tail -3 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.
